mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user (campus_id, username, password, nick_name, phone_number, email, user_type, status, deleted, create_time) VALUES
( #{item.campusId}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.phoneNumber}, #{item.email}, #{item.userType}, #{item.status}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT username FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND username IN
#{item}

SELECT phone_number FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND phone_number IN
#{item}
